sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Millennium group (AMRC) discloses 5.2% Ameresco position in Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Millennium Management LLC, Millennium Group Management LLC, and Israel A. Englander have disclosed a 5.2% beneficial ownership in Ameresco, Inc. (AMRC) Class A Common Stock via a Schedule 13G filing. This represents 1,816,169 shares with shared voting and dispositive power. The filing clarifies that while the shares are held by entities under their control, this should not be construed as an admission of beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Paramount Skydance (PSKY) grants 46,893 RSUs and 25,000 shares to director
feed.summary: Paramount Skydance Corp. director John L. Thornton reported equity compensation changes, including the vesting of 25,000 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into Class B common stock and a new grant of 46,893 RSUs. The vested shares were issued on July 21, 2026, when the stock closed at $8.53 per share. The new RSU grant is expected to vest on the earlier of the Issuer's 2027 Annual Meeting or July 21, 2027.

feed.title: Paramount Skydance (NASDAQ: PSKY) director receives 25,000 shares, 46,893 RSUs
feed.summary: Paramount Skydance Corp director Paul T. Marinelli reported changes in his equity compensation, including the vesting of 25,000 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into 25,000 shares of Class B common stock, valued at $8.53 per share on July 21, 2026. Additionally, Marinelli received a new grant of 46,893 RSUs, which are expected to vest on the earlier of the 2027 annual meeting or July 21, 2027. These transactions were not executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan.

feed.title: Waters Corp (WAT) Shares Surge 3.1% -- What GF Score of 94 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Waters Corp (WAT) shares surged 3.1% to $382.41, indicating it is undervalued by 11.2% according to the GF Value™ of $430.40. The company holds a strong GF Score™ of 94/100, driven by excellent growth and valuation ranks, despite a moderate financial strength score. There have been no insider transactions in the last three months, suggesting insider confidence or a wait-and-see approach.

feed.title: Paramount Skydance Corp (PSKY) director reports RSU vesting and new grant
feed.summary: Paramount Skydance Corp director Justin Hamill reported equity transactions including the vesting of 25,000 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into Class B common stock on July 21, 2026, when the stock closed at $8.53 per share. Additionally, Hamill received a new grant of 46,893 RSUs, which are generally set to vest on the earlier of the 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders or July 21, 2027. These transactions were detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing.

feed.title: Andrew Campion RSU vesting and grant at Paramount Skydance Corp (NASDAQ: PSKY)
feed.summary: Paramount Skydance Corp director Andrew Campion reported the vesting of 17,433 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into Class B common stock and a new grant of 46,893 RSUs. The vested RSUs were valued at $8.53 per share, and the new RSUs are set to vest by July 21, 2027, or the 2027 annual meeting. Following these transactions, Campion holds 17,433 Class B shares and 46,893 RSUs directly.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker Raises Quarterly Dividend to $0.84 a Share, Payable Sept. 22 to Holders of Record Sept. 8
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker has announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.84 per share. The dividend will be payable on September 22, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 8, 2026. This news was published 10 minutes prior to the article crawl time.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies Inc (LHX) Shares Surge 5.1% -- What GF Sco
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies Inc (LHX) shares surged 5.1% today, but GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is Modestly Overvalued at $299.67, 15.3% above its intrinsic value estimate. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 87/100, driven by excellent growth and profitability, the financial strength and momentum scores are moderate, and insider selling suggests a lack of confidence. Investors are advised to consider these valuation metrics, as there may be risks of future price corrections.

feed.title: McDonald’s declares $1.86 quarterly dividend per share
feed.summary: McDonald's Corporation has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.86 per share of common stock. This dividend will be paid on September 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2026. The company operates over 45,000 locations globally, with approximately 95% owned and operated by independent local business owners.

feed.title: STX (STX): James C. Lee files notice to sell 543 common shares
feed.summary: James C. Lee, a shareholder of Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX), has filed a Form 144 notice indicating his intent to sell 543 shares of common stock through Morgan Stanley on or after July 23, 2026. The planned sale has an aggregate market value of $490,740.98. The filing also notes 1,237 shares related to restricted stock unit vesting and references a prior sale of 697 shares on May 4, 2026.

feed.title: Stein, Jackson say NC regulators need to hold Duke Energy to federal data center pledge
feed.summary: North Carolina Governor Josh Stein and Attorney General Jeff Jackson are urging the state Utilities Commission to compel Duke Energy to formally commit to the Trump administration's Ratepayer Protection Pledge. They want Duke Energy to agree in writing to prevent data centers from shifting costs to consumers, ensuring a legally binding agreement that requires data centers to cover their full power and infrastructure expenses. This comes as North Carolina leaders have been working on stricter regulations for data centers, including repealing sales tax exemptions on electricity purchases for these facilities.

feed.title: Freeport McMoRan eyes $4.5B expansion of Arizona mine as investment decision looms
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. is planning a $4.5 billion expansion of its mine operation in northwest Arizona. The company expects to make an investment decision by the end of the year. This expansion aims to increase copper production by 200 to 250 million pounds annually.

feed.title: General Electric (GE) files Form 144 for sale of 1,517 common shares
feed.summary: General Electric Co. has filed a Form 144 indicating a planned sale of 1,517 shares of its common stock through UBS Financial Services Inc. These shares originate from two stock option exercises totaling 1,026 and 491 shares, both dated July 23, 2026, and are slated for cash sales on the NYSE. The filing aims to ensure transparency regarding the proposed transaction.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Q2 2026 earnings summary
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust (DLR) reported a strong Q2 2026, achieving record bookings of $108M and adding 142 new logos. The company's core FFO per share reached $2.13, and its backlog grew to $1.9B, supporting multi-year growth. DLR also raised its full-year 2026 guidance for revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and core FFO per share, driven by strong demand and strategic investments.

feed.title: Newmont (NEM) Q2 2026 earnings summary
feed.summary: Newmont (NEM) reported strong Q2 2026 results, including 1.3 million gold ounces produced, $2.2 billion net income, and $3.8 billion adjusted EBITDA, maintaining its full-year guidance. The company achieved $2.2 billion in free cash flow for the quarter and returned $1.9 billion to shareholders. Newmont ended Q2 with a strong cash position and announced regulatory approval for the Red Chris project, with Cadia production resuming.

feed.title: Union Pacific Corp (UNP) Stock Up 4.0% but GF Value Says Overval
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corp (UNP) shares rose 4.0% to $304.33, but GuruFocus's GF Value indicates the stock is overvalued by 22.7% compared to its intrinsic value of $248.07. Despite a strong GF Score of 91/100, driven by excellent profitability and momentum, the stock's current P/E ratio of 25.1x is significantly above its historical median, and insiders have sold $8.8 million in stock, suggesting potential risks for investors.

feed.title: Advent to Hire Morgan Stanley to Sell Its Tigre Stake
feed.summary: Advent International has reportedly hired Morgan Stanley to explore the sale of its stake in Tigre SA, a Brazilian pipe and hydraulic systems manufacturer. Discussions are in the early stages, and Advent may choose not to proceed with the sale. This potential divestment signals a strategic move by the private equity firm regarding its investment in the Latin American industrial sector.

feed.title: Icahn Enterprises' Q2 webcast replay will last at least 12 months
feed.summary: Icahn Enterprises L.P. (Nasdaq: IEP) announced it will host a webcast on Wednesday, August 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time, to discuss its second-quarter 2026 financial results. A replay of the webcast will be available for at least twelve months. The company, a diversified holding company, operates in seven primary business segments and encourages viewers to join 15 minutes early for the live event.

feed.title: Stryker Corp (SYK) Shares Surge 3.1% -- What GF Score of 92 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Stryker Corp (SYK) shares rose 3.1% on July 23, 2026, despite a year-to-date decline, and are considered 23.0% undervalued with a strong GF Score of 92/100. Despite this, insiders have sold $100.7 million in stock recently, raising caution for potential investors. The company's GF Value™ suggests an upside, but insider selling indicates potential challenges ahead, warranting thorough due diligence.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase Strengthens Board Independence With Bylaw Change
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) has amended its By-laws to enhance board independence by requiring that any Lead Independent Director be appointed by non-management directors. This change, enacted on July 21, 2026, aims to strengthen oversight, transparency, and accountability for stakeholders. JPMorgan Chase's stock also received a "Buy" rating from analysts with a $375 price target, and Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates JPM as "Outperform" citing strong financial performance.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) Trading Down 2.9% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) experienced a 2.9% drop in share price during mid-day trading on Thursday, despite largely positive sentiment from Wall Street analysts who hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus. The company reported strong Q2 earnings, beating EPS and revenue expectations with significant year-over-year revenue growth. However, insider selling, including shares from directors James J. Goetz and Helle Thorning-Schmidt, has been noted.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.02 a Share, Payable Sept. 3 to Holders of Record Aug. 13
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.02 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on September 3rd to shareholders of record as of August 13th. This decision follows recent analyst adjustments to price targets for Ingersoll Rand, with Stifel maintaining a Hold rating.

feed.title: Chubb and Atome launch shopping fraud cover
feed.summary: Chubb Philippines and Atome Philippines have partnered to launch the Atome Card Shield, a shopping insurance plan for Atome cardholders. For $0.99 a month, the plan offers buyer and purchase protection, online shopping fraud and unauthorized transaction coverage, and personal accident benefits up to $2,400. Policyholders can claim for online purchases that don't arrive, don't match descriptions, or are damaged/stolen within 30 days, as well as fraudulent website purchases and unauthorized card transactions.

feed.title: Kroger, Dollar Tree, and Grocery Outlet Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Kroger, Dollar Tree, and Grocery Outlet experienced declines following reports that almost half of American consumers are reducing their grocery spending due to economic pressures. An analysis from Bain & Company and NielsenIQ indicated a drop in unit sales and total volumes, affecting grocery chains' revenues and profit margins. Despite the market reaction, the article suggests that significant price drops can create buying opportunities for high-quality stocks.

feed.title: News | JLL grows New York retail team; Prologis picks global development head; Starwood promotes veteran to acquisition lead
feed.summary: JLL has expanded its New York retail team with the addition of Joshua Strauss and Scott Zinovoy, focusing on strengthening the firm's leasing capabilities. Prologis appointed Travis Harvey as global head of development and promoted Sheila Sutton to senior vice president for U.S. East development management. Starwood Capital Group named Qahir Madhany as head of acquisitions in the Americas, overseeing equity investments and real estate transactions.

feed.title: IonQ (NYSE:IONQ) Trading Down 1.6% - Here's Why
feed.summary: IonQ (NYSE:IONQ) shares dropped 1.6% on Thursday, closing at $34.12 on lower-than-average volume. The stock faces mixed sentiment, with positive news including new quantum AI research and institutional call buying, offset by concerns over its high valuation, negative margins, and profitability challenges. Despite these issues, Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $69.88.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Shares Down 1.5% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) shares experienced a 1.5% decline, trading around $146.94 with below-average volume. Despite the dip, analyst sentiment for P&G remains largely positive, holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $161.74. The company recently reported strong EPS of $1.59, surpassing estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.0885 per share, yielding approximately 3.0%.

feed.title: Former M&T Bank exec joins Pioneer board
feed.summary: Retired M&T Bank executive Mike Keegan has been appointed to the board of directors at Pioneer Bancorp Inc. Keegan, known in banking circles, retired last year before taking on this new role.

feed.title: Eversource, National Grid, EnergyHub, Sunrun, and the Mobility House Launch V2G Pilot in Massachusetts
feed.summary: Eversource, National Grid, EnergyHub, Sunrun, and The Mobility House have partnered to launch a vehicle-to-grid (V2G) pilot program in Massachusetts. This initiative will allow qualifying residential customers with V2G-capable electric vehicles to enroll in the existing ConnectedSolutions program, which currently utilizes flexible capacity from thermostats, batteries, and commercial resources to stabilize the electric grid. The pilot aims to assess how V2G technology can further enhance grid reliability and provide customers with opportunities to manage energy costs, leveraging the state's growing number of EVs.

feed.title: Ladder Capital Corp Q2 2026 Earnings Call Summary
feed.summary: Ladder Capital Corp is strategically rotating out of lower-yielding securities into floating-rate first mortgages, leading to a 75% growth in its loan portfolio over the past year. The company maintains a disciplined approach to lending, particularly in the office sector, and holds an investment-grade capital structure. Management plans to continue opportunistic share repurchases and debt issuance while targeting a narrowing of the valuation gap through strategic marketing to institutional investors.

feed.title: GE stock finds support as aerospace growth offsets spin-off transition
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) stock is finding support from double-digit growth in its aerospace segment and ongoing portfolio simplification, including the spin-off of its healthcare and energy divisions. The company's 2023 results highlighted stronger margins resulting from increased jet-engine demand and services. While aerospace and power segments show solid performance, the profitability of the renewables segment remains a key focus area for investors.

feed.title: Hartford (NYSE:HIG) Reports Q2 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
feed.summary: The Hartford (NYSE:HIG) reported its Q2 CY2026 earnings, meeting Wall Street's revenue expectations with a 4% year-on-year increase to $7.26 billion. The company's non-GAAP profit of $3.42 per share surpassed analyst estimates by 8.9%. Despite positive results in EPS and book value per share, the stock traded down 2% after the report, suggesting the market desired more substantial gains.

feed.title: Full Transcript: VeriSign Q2 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: VeriSign reported strong financial results for Q2 2026, including increased free cash flow and stable liquidity, and provided updated full-year guidance. The company highlighted significant growth in domain registrations, driven in part by AI's impact on digital identity, and outlined plans for the launch of the .web TLD with pricing and marketing flexibility. VeriSign also stressed its commitment to 100% service availability and its intention to roll out new security features to address AI-driven challenges.

feed.title: Digital Realty raises annual FFO forecast on robust data center demand
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust has increased its full-year forecast for funds from operations (FFO) and total revenue, driven by strong leasing momentum from cloud and AI customers. The company expects adjusted FFO between $8.15 and $8.20 per share and revenue between $6.85 billion and $6.95 billion for fiscal 2026. This positive outlook follows strong second-quarter results, with revenue of $1.92 billion and adjusted FFO of $2.65 per share, both beating analyst estimates, as Digital Realty benefits from the demand for generative AI computing power.

feed.title: Steakholder Foods Announces ADS Ratio Adjustment
feed.summary: Steakholder Foods Ltd. (Nasdaq: STKH) announced an adjustment to its American Depositary Shares (ADS) ratio, changing it from 1 ADS representing 4,000 ordinary shares to 1 ADS representing 12,000 ordinary shares, effective July 27, 2026. This adjustment effectively acts as a one-for-three reverse ADS split for ADS holders, requiring no action on their part. The company, a leader in 3D-printing technology for plant-based meat, will continue to trade on Nasdaq under the ticker "STKH".

feed.title: Old Second Bancorp: Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Old Second Bancorp (OSBC) reported second-quarter net income of $28.2 million, resulting in earnings of 54 cents per share, or 55 cents per share when adjusted for non-recurring costs. This exceeded Wall Street expectations. The financial holding company also reported revenue of $113.5 million for the period, surpassing Street forecasts, with net interest expense revenue at $99.8 million.

feed.title: Be Sure To Check Out KT Corporation (KRX:030200) Before It Goes Ex-Dividend
feed.summary: KT Corporation (KRX:030200) is set to trade ex-dividend in the next four days, with a payment of ₩600.00 per share, contributing to a 4.6% trailing yield. The company's dividend appears sustainable, supported by a modest 38% payout ratio from earnings and 33% from free cash flow. Additionally, KT has demonstrated strong earnings per share growth of 17% annually over the past five years, suggesting the potential for continued dividend increases.

feed.title: Horizon Bancorp stock trades steady as latest quarterly results show modest loan and margin trends
feed.summary: Horizon Bancorp (HBNC) stock is trading steady as its latest quarterly results reveal moderate loan growth, stable net interest margins, and a cautious approach to credit quality. As a regional US bank, its revenue is primarily driven by net interest income, with additional contributions from noninterest income activities. The bank focuses on disciplined credit underwriting, managing interest rate risk, and maintaining core deposit relationships to ensure stability and growth.

feed.title: Kimco Realty Corp. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Kimco Realty Corp. (KIM) stock dropped 1.53% on Thursday, closing at $25.74. This underperformance occurred during a broader market decline, with the S&P 500 falling 1.21% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average decreasing by 0.97%. The decline ended a two-day winning streak for the company's shares.

feed.title: JAKK: Q2 2026 net sales up 17% year-over-year, with strong gains in Toys/Consumer Products and Costumes
feed.summary: JAKK's Q2 2026 net sales increased 17% year-over-year to $139.2 million, driven by strong performance in its Toys/Consumer Products and Costumes segments. The company also saw a 15% rise in gross profit and a more than doubling of adjusted EBITDA, with the operating loss narrowing significantly. This suggests a strong financial quarter for JAKK.

feed.title: VEFU ETF Profile: Dividends, Returns (GETTEX:VEFU)
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed profile of the VanEck Biotech ETF (VEFU), including its dividends, returns, and key financial statistics. It covers assets under management, dividend yield, expense ratio, inception date, and the index it tracks, the MVIS US Listed Biotech 25. The profile also details the fund's holdings by sector and region, and addresses frequently asked questions regarding its investment strategy and performance.

feed.title: Intelligent Bio Solutions addresses cybersecurity issues, keeps 510(k) submission on track for H2 2026
feed.summary: Intelligent Bio Solutions (INBS) has successfully resolved all cybersecurity and software review issues, critical steps for its planned FDA 510(k) submission in the second half of 2026. The company completed independent penetration testing, remediated all high and most low-risk vulnerabilities, and resolved all SBOM vulnerabilities, ensuring compliance with FDA guidance. These actions keep the 510(k) package on schedule, aiming for U.S. market entry beyond forensic use, specifically targeting codeine detection, and a new manufacturing partnership is expected to significantly reduce production costs and improve gross margins.

feed.title: Chipotle Mexican Grill nearing completion of new Lehigh Valley location
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is nearing completion of a new location at 1900 Sullivan Trail in Forks Township, Pennsylvania, expected to open by the end of 2026. This expansion is part of Chipotle's broader growth strategy, aiming for 7,000 locations in the U.S. and Canada, and coincides with the development of a Members 1st Federal Credit Union and The Learning Experience in the same area. The new restaurant will feature a drive-thru for pick-up orders and continue to offer its customizable, responsibly sourced Mexican cuisine.

feed.title: Crown Castle Raises 2026 AFFO Outlook Amid Transformation
feed.summary: Crown Castle (CCI) reported its Q2 2026 results, showing a decline in site rental revenues and net income year-over-year, but increased AFFO by 10%. The company raised its full-year 2026 AFFO outlook, driven by its strategic transformation into a pure-play U.S. tower operator following the sale of its Fiber and Small Cell businesses. Analyst ratings currently stand at a Buy with a $95.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates CCI as Neutral due to cash generation and technical trends tempered by balance-sheet fragility and valuation concerns.

feed.title: 12 Industrials Stocks Moving In Thursday's After-Market Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 industrials stocks that experienced significant movement during Thursday's after-market trading session. It details the percentage change in stock price and the market capitalization for each company mentioned, highlighting both gainers and losers. The information was generated by Benzinga's automated content engine.

feed.title: Verisign stock edges lower as Q2 earnings miss overshadows revenue beat
feed.summary: Verisign Inc. reported Q2 adjusted earnings per share of $2.38, missing analyst estimates of $2.45, while revenue reached $434.6 million, slightly beating the $433.83 million estimate. Despite the revenue beat, the earnings miss caused the company's shares to fall by 0.9%. The company highlighted its 29-year record of 100% availability for .com and .net domain name resolution and an increase in domain name registrations.

feed.title: Synopsys Inc. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Synopsys Inc. (SNPS) stock fell 1.08% to $373.52 on Thursday, marking its second consecutive day of losses. This underperformance occurred during a general market downturn, with the S&P 500 Index (SPX) falling 1.21% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) declining 0.97%. The article highlights Synopsys's stock performance relative to the broader market and its competitors.

feed.title: Tapestry Inc. stock falls Thursday, still outperforms market
feed.summary: Tapestry Inc. (TPR) stock fell 3.20% on Thursday, closing at $139.13. Despite the decline, the stock still outperformed the broader market, as the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also experienced drops of 1.21% and 0.97% respectively. This fall ended a two-day winning streak for Tapestry Inc.

feed.title: Oracle signs 10-year software contract with Pentagon worth up to $7 billion
feed.summary: Oracle has secured a 10-year contract with the U.S. Department of Defense, valued at up to $7 billion, to provide on-premises software. The deal comes as Oracle's stock has faced investor concerns regarding AI's impact on software incumbents, despite the company's efforts to expand its AI infrastructure and cloud services. Oracle co-founder Larry Ellison has also been a supporter of President Donald Trump, who was involved in previous collaborations between the Pentagon and tech companies on AI deployments.

feed.title: Match Group (MTCH) CFO receives new dividend equivalent awards
feed.summary: Match Group, Inc. CFO Steven Richard Bailey Jr. was awarded three grants of dividend equivalents on July 21, 2026, totaling 29, 172, and 382 units. These awards convert one-for-one into common stock and vest proportionately with related restricted stock units, subject to his continued service. The dividend equivalents accrue on RSUs with vesting schedules beginning as early as March 1, 2025, and extending through March 1, 2029.
